title: 東京大賞典の後に・地方の“テッペン”

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is picking up the pace! She's pulling
away! And Inari One takes it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You were amazing, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Inariii! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Heh... You've become a fine racer indeed.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Look at me... I can't even hold back a few tears.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This heat...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's making my heart race.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I agree... That's how breathtaking this race was. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I did it...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I did it... I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: YEAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I won! I'm standin' at the top of the regionals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss! Did ya see that?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss! Did ya see that?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We did it! Right here in Oi... the top belongs to
us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari! Inari! Inari! Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank ya so much! I, Inari One, wanna
take this opportunity to make an announcement!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In my senior year... I'm gonna take the top of the
centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I plan on winnin' a bunch of G1 races! And then...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll become next year's Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I just knew Inari had something big in
store.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: She knows that we're here. This must be...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, this is a message to us as well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I won't lose to you, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was a surprise. Today's race was one thing,
but I didn't think those two thought so highly of
Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
And to top it off, the whole crowd's buzzing with
energy after her declaration!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought Tamamo Cross's absence would put
things at a standstill, but this might change things
up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Boss. What race should I go for next?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Boss. What race should I go for next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm stunned that she'd turn to ask me that so soon
after her win, but I know just the race to start her
senior year!
choice_data_list: Let's do the spring Tenno Sho!
Let's do the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sounds good to me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Next year, I'm takin' on the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Get ready, 'cause I'm gonna launch one huge
firework after another in the wildest festival
anyone's ever seen in the centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So don't forget to come—you won't wanna miss it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've said it in front of everyone. No
backin' down now, partner!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hah! That's my trainer—cool as ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with Inari One's domination of the
regionals behind us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our fiery procession continues as we make our
way to the next festival—the G1 central races of
her senior year!
